feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP B1 UI Templates
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts,

Is it possible to add any new tabs in the starndard (default) report provided by SAP by using "Edit Form UI"?

Our clients in UK used "BAS report generation", They asked me to add the following information to check each information smoother during BAS report generation process.

  • Description of transactions
  • Business Partner

I used UI API, but I could not add new tab.

 

 

 

 

 

Our B1 version is as follows:

  • SAP Business One 10.0  SP 2408

Best regards,

entry.title: BUDGET QUERY
entry.content:
Good afternoon, esteemed experts. I am looking to create a query for the Budget section that compares the actual budget and the amount when a purchase order is generated. The idea is to validate whether it falls within a certain range — for example, from 1 to 200, or from 200 to 400 as an excess over the budget. The issue is that the query returns too many results. Do you have any ideas on how to structure it?

  SELECT

  *

  FROM(

  SELECT

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode,

  SUM(T1.LineTotal) Total

  FROM ODRF T0

  INNER JOIN DRF1 T1 ON T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry

  WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.ObjType = '22' AND T0.DocType = 'S'

  GROUP BY

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode

  )A

  INNER JOIN (

  SELECT

  T0.AbsId,

  T0.OcrCode,

  T1.AcctCode,

  T2.DebLTotal

  FROM OBGS T0

  INNER JOIN OBGT T1 ON T1.Instance = T0.AbsId

  INNER JOIN BGT1 T2 ON T2.BudgId = T1.AbsId AND T2.Line_ID = (MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)-1)

  WHERE YEAR(T0.FinancYear) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)

  )B ON B.AcctCode = A.AcctCode AND B.OcrCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN(

  SELECT

  Account,

  ProfitCode,

  SUM(Debit-Credit) Used

  FROM JDT1 T0

  WHERE (YEAR(T0.RefDate) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)) AND (MONTH(T0.RefDate) = MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO))

  GROUP BY

  Account,

  ProfitCode

  )C ON C.Account = A.AcctCode AND C.ProfitCode = A.OcrCode

  WHERE (A.Total + ISNULL(C.Used,'0')) > B.DebLTotal

)

BEGIN

  SET @CuentaOC = (

  SELECT

  TOP 1 CAST(D.AcctName AS VARCHAR(20)) + ' - ' + CAST(A.OcrCode AS VARCHAR(10))

  FROM(

  SELECT

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode,

  SUM(T1.LineTotal) Total

  FROM ODRF T0

  INNER JOIN DRF1 T1 ON T1.DocEntry = T0.DocEntry

  WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T0.ObjType = '22' AND T0.DocType = 'S'

  GROUP BY

  T1.AcctCode,

  T1.OcrCode

  )A

  INNER JOIN (

  SELECT

  T0.AbsId,

  T0.OcrCode,

  T1.AcctCode,

  T2.DebLTotal

  FROM OBGS T0

  INNER JOIN OBGT T1 ON T1.Instance = T0.AbsId

  INNER JOIN BGT1 T2 ON T2.BudgId = T1.AbsId AND T2.Line_ID = (MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)-1)

  WHERE YEAR(T0.FinancYear) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)

  )B ON B.AcctCode = A.AcctCode AND B.OcrCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN(

  SELECT

  Account,

  ProfitCode,

  SUM(Debit-Credit) Used

  FROM JDT1 T0

  WHERE (YEAR(T0.RefDate) = YEAR(@FechaPRESUPUESTO)) AND (MONTH(T0.RefDate) = MONTH(@FechaPRESUPUESTO))

  GROUP BY

  Account,

  ProfitCode

  )C ON C.Account = A.AcctCode AND C.ProfitCode = A.OcrCode

  INNER JOIN OACT D ON D.AcctCode = A.AcctCode

  WHERE (A.Total + ISNULL(C.Used,'0')) > B.DebLTotal

  )

entry.title: (APIs) TransportationCode -1 not acquired
entry.content:
Hi guys, here again to ask your GURU help.

When I try to PATCH the value -1 for "TransportationCode" (no transport) via SL, the document takes casual values from OSHP table, but not -1.

I tried patching only the document head TransportationCode, but nothing to do, so I tried to patch even the lines combined with the head (as you can see by code below, tried also via PostMan) but results doesn't change: casual values existing in OSHP, also different between head and lines.

{
  "DocEntry": 263,
  "TransportationCode": -1,
  "DocumentLines": [
           {
            "LineNum": 0,
           "ShippingMethod": -1
          }
 ]
}

Instead, if I patch with zero (nonsense, because not in the OSHP...) it is accepted and acquired. 

Does anyone know where I'm wrong?

Thank you.

entry.title: Subledger Source Document Type in Journal Entry Query
entry.content:
Hi All

How to get a corresponding mapping between these two Origin values in Journal Entry Query Statement and Subledger Journal Entry so we know which Origin Number in JE belongs to AP Invoice PU Origin?

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Report for Attachment path
entry.content:
Hello,

Is it possible to create a report which would show us if the link is broken?

Ex. if there is a picture attached to an item and if the the link is broken, we get an error message "file not found". 

I would like to know if there is a way to find out items where the attachment link is broken?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Set default value when creating a sales order
entry.content:
I need to know if it is possible in SAP B1 version, when creating a sales order, to automatically set the current date in the delivery field?

Thank you

entry.title: Error when installing SAP B1 ServerTools
entry.content:
I'm trying to install SAP Business One Server Tools but the installation keeps crashing while trying to select components and click next.

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Any one has any idea on how to fix this?

entry.title: What is item cost and by which document addition will it be affected in sap b1?
Unable to log on to SAP Business One client Windows 11 v24h2
entry.content: After installing SAP B1 V10 on Windows 11 V 24H2, the SAP client is unable to find the server.  It rather displays 99 in the Current Server dropdown.  I ran the install as Administrator, installed msodbcsql and sql native client.  I also checked to ensure the b1-local-machine file is properly pointing to the server name.  Anyone with a solution?  Seems to be an issue with Windows 11 v24h2.

entry.title: DML Perform in Crystal Report
entry.content: Hi, I want to perform DML in Crystal Reports. is it possible? and how?

entry.title: Auto convert just the English words for Amount total to Thai Language in Crystal Report Design
entry.content:
Hi All

How to Auto convert just the English words for Amount total to Thai Language in Crystal Report Design?

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: Block GRPO if Not for A specific Warehouse and A specific Bin
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to create a TN which blocks the addition of GRPO if a specific Bin location is not selected.

I have tried the below TN but it works only for warehouse but not for Bin:

DECLARE @Item AS NVARCHAR(25)
SET @Item = (SELECT TOP 1 ISNULL(T1.ItemCode,'')
FROM OPDN T0
INNER JOIN PDN1 T1 ON T0.DocEntry=T1.DocEntry
INNER JOIN OITM T2 ON T2.ItemCode = T1.ItemCode
INNER JOIN OILM T4 on T1.docentry=T4.DocEntry and T1.LineNum=T4.DocLineNum and T4.TransType=20 and T4.LocCode=T1.WhsCode --AND T4.AccumType=1
LEFT JOIN OBTL T5 on T4.MessageID= T5.MessageID
LEFT JOIN OBIN T6 on T5.BinAbs=T6.absentry and T6.whscode=T1.WhsCode
WHERE T0.DocEntry = @List_of_cols_val_tab_del AND T2.QryGroup5 = 'Y'
AND T1.WhsCode NOT IN ('50-QCH') AND T6.BinCode NOT IN( '50-QCH-QC')
)
IF (SELECT @Item) != ''
BEGIN
SET @error = 2003
SET @error_message = (SELECT @Item + ' Item is flagged for Review and must be moved to 50-QCH-QC Bin!!')
GOTO TN_RESULT
END

Any suggestions?

Regards,

Joseph

entry.title: Payment Amount Greater Than Invoice Amount \[VPM2.SumApplied] - CCO Monitor
entry.content:
Description:
We're using *SAP Customer Checkout (CCO) FP21, integrated with **SAP Business One*, and encountering the following error when settling an invoice:

> [VPM2.SumApplied] Payment amount is greater than invoice amount

Scenario:

* Invoice currency: AED (local currency)
* Payment currency: USD (foreign currency)
* Invoice is fetched from SAP B1 into CCO
* Customer pays in USD (e.g., \$28)
* Exchange rate (USD → AED): e.g., 1 USD = 3.67
* This converts to AED 102.76
* Invoice total is only AED 100
* CCO displays the change (2.76 AED) correctly
* But when syncing to SAP B1, it throws the error:
Payment amount is greater than invoice amount [VPM2.SumApplied]

Suspected Cause:

Although change is correctly returned to the customer in CCO, the full amount (102.76 AED) is still being sent to SAP B1 as SumApplied, instead of just the applied invoice amount (100 AED).

Question:

How can we configure SAP CCO to only apply the exact invoice amount (100 AED) when the payment is made in a foreign currency (USD), and handle the rest as change — without triggering this error in SAP B1?

entry.title: SBO_SP_PostTransactionNotice updates item's price but not detected by B1IF
entry.content:
Hi dear community members,


I have a question related to SAP B1 more technically:
While clients adding A/P invoice, they set sales price in the user defined field per item. After adding document my SBO_SP_PostTransactionNotice updates these items' price in the exact pricelist. I want to know what is the difference between this case and manual price change? Because SAP Customer Checkout has items synchronization job, it uses sap.POS.FetchMaterialList scenario in B1IF and 1st case it does not detect item's price changed, but if we change price manually  it detects. Which field of ITM1 I should update in procedure in order to be detected by B1IF?

Here is my procedure:

IF :object_type in ('18') AND (:transaction_type = 'A' OR :transaction_type = 'U') THEN

UPDATE "ITM1" T0
SET
"Price" = (
SELECT MAX(P."U_newPriceUZS")
FROM "PCH1" P
WHERE
P."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode"
AND P."DocEntry" IN ( :list_of_cols_val_tab_del )
),
"Currency" = 'UZS'
WHERE
T0."PriceList" = '5'
AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM "PCH1" P
WHERE
P."ItemCode" = T0."ItemCode"
AND P."DocEntry" IN ( :list_of_cols_val_tab_del )
);

END IF;

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA SAP Customer Checkout 

@Darius @elena_vavitsa @bikash_bansal

entry.title: SAP B1 10.0 Multi-branch Balance Sheets?
entry.content: Is it possible to generate a separate balance sheet for each branch in SAP B1 10.0 in addition to a consolidated balance sheet?

entry.title: The requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context
entry.content:
hi all, When I import addon into sap for startup, it prompts me that the requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context.
My sap b1 version number is 10.00.250, .net framework4.8
So I want to know, is this problem a problem with my addon code or Settings, or is it a Windows problem? I have checked relevant materials and some say it's a problem caused by Windows.
The following is my code. Please help analyze it
class Program

  class Program
    {
        public static SAPbouiCOM.Application SBO_Application;
        public static SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany;
        public static string SelectedItemCode = ""; 
        /// <summary>
        /// The main entry point for the application.
        /// </summary>
        [STAThread]
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi sboGuiApi = new SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi();
                string sConnectionString = args.Length > 0 ? args[0] : Environment.GetCommandLineArgs()[1];
                sboGuiApi.Connect(sConnectionString);
                SBO_Application = sboGuiApi.GetApplication(-1);             
                oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)SBO_Application.Company.GetDICompany();
                if (oCompany.Connected)
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection successful! DI Company is ready", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
                }
                else
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection failed. Please check the connection information", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
                    return;
                }
                Application oApp = null;
                if (args.Length < 1)
                {
                    oApp = new Application();
                }
                else
                {
                    //If you want to use an add-on identifier for the development license, you can specify an add-on identifier string as the second parameter.
                    //oApp = new Application(args[0], "XXXXX");
                    oApp = new Application(args[0]);
                }
                Menu MyMenu = new Menu();               
                MyMenu.AddMenuItems();
                oApp.RegisterMenuEventHandler(MyMenu.SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
                Application.SBO_Application.AppEvent += new SAPbouiCOM._IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
                setAttribute setA = new setAttribute(SBO_Application, oCompany);
                setA.Initialize();
                oApp.Run();
                
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
            }
        }

        

        static void SBO_Application_AppEvent(SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes EventType)
        {
            switch (EventType)
            {
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ShutDown:
                    //Exit Add-On
                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.Exit();
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_CompanyChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_FontChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_LanguageChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ServerTerminition:
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        }
    }

  class setAttribute

 

 

private Application SBO_Application;
        private SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany; 
        string openProDocentry = "";
        public setAttribute(SAPbouiCOM.Application app, SAPbobsCOM.Company company)
        {
            this.SBO_Application = app;
            this.oCompany = company;
        }
        public void Initialize()
        {            
            SBO_Application.AppEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
            SBO_Application.ItemEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_ItemEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_ItemEvent);
            SBO_Application.MenuEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_MenuEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
            SBO_Application.MessageBox("Event registration completed and connection successful!");
        }

When I activate addon, it will prompt "Connection successful!" DI Company is ready
then is

entry.title: The requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context
entry.content:
hi all, When I import addon into sap for startup, it prompts me that the requested lookup key was not found in any active activation context.
My sap b1 version number is 10.00.250, .net framework4.8
So I want to know, is this problem a problem with my addon code or Settings, or is it a Windows problem? I have checked relevant materials and some say it's a problem caused by Windows.
The following is my code. Please help analyze it

class Program


class Program
    {
        public static SAPbouiCOM.Application SBO_Application;
        public static SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany;
        public static string SelectedItemCode = ""; 
        /// <summary>
        /// The main entry point for the application.
        /// </summary>
        [STAThread]
        static void Main(string[] args)
        {
            try
            {
                SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi sboGuiApi = new SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi();
                string sConnectionString = args.Length > 0 ? args[0] : Environment.GetCommandLineArgs()[1];
                sboGuiApi.Connect(sConnectionString);
                SBO_Application = sboGuiApi.GetApplication(-1);             
                oCompany = (SAPbobsCOM.Company)SBO_Application.Company.GetDICompany();
                if (oCompany.Connected)
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection successful! DI Company is ready", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Success);
                }
                else
                {
                    SBO_Application.StatusBar.SetText("Connection failed. Please check the connection information", SAPbouiCOM.BoMessageTime.bmt_Short, SAPbouiCOM.BoStatusBarMessageType.smt_Error);
                    return;
                }
                Application oApp = null;
                if (args.Length < 1)
                {
                    oApp = new Application();
                }
                else
                {
                    //If you want to use an add-on identifier for the development license, you can specify an add-on identifier string as the second parameter.
                    //oApp = new Application(args[0], "XXXXX");
                    oApp = new Application(args[0]);
                }
                Menu MyMenu = new Menu();               
                MyMenu.AddMenuItems();
                oApp.RegisterMenuEventHandler(MyMenu.SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
                Application.SBO_Application.AppEvent += new SAPbouiCOM._IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
                setAttribute setA = new setAttribute(SBO_Application, oCompany);
                setA.Initialize();
                oApp.Run();
                
            }
            catch (Exception ex)
            {
                System.Windows.Forms.MessageBox.Show(ex.Message);
            }
        }

        

        static void SBO_Application_AppEvent(SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes EventType)
        {
            switch (EventType)
            {
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ShutDown:
                    //Exit Add-On
                    System.Windows.Forms.Application.Exit();
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_CompanyChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_FontChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_LanguageChanged:
                    break;
                case SAPbouiCOM.BoAppEventTypes.aet_ServerTerminition:
                    break;
                default:
                    break;
            }
        }
    }

class setAttribute

 

private Application SBO_Application;
        private SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany; 
        string openProDocentry = "";
        public setAttribute(SAPbouiCOM.Application app, SAPbobsCOM.Company company)
        {
            this.SBO_Application = app;
            this.oCompany = company;
        }
        public void Initialize()
        {            
            SBO_Application.AppEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_AppEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_AppEvent);
            SBO_Application.ItemEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_ItemEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_ItemEvent);
            SBO_Application.MenuEvent += new _IApplicationEvents_MenuEventEventHandler(SBO_Application_MenuEvent);
            SBO_Application.MessageBox("Event registration completed and connection successful!");
        }


When I activate addon, it will prompt "Connection successful!" DI Company is ready
then is

entry.title: Multiple Item Valuation Method used into Items SAP Business One
entry.content:
Dear Team,

In company settings, Moving average valuation method is setup. Users are using Item master with different valuation method like Moving average, FIFO, Standard. 

What's the major impact ? it is safe with multiple valuation method or suggest to follow single valuation method?   

Please advice on it. Thanks.

SAP Business One, SAP B1, SBO,  #Item master #Valuation Method

Regards,

Nikunj

entry.title: Assistance Required: Restricting Receipt Stock Usage Before Production Order Closure -SAP B1 Busines
entry.content:
Dear All,

I need your assistance regarding the Production Order Receipt Stock.
My query is: How can we restrict sales users from using the receipt stock before the production order is closed as per the planned quantity?

Alternatively, is there a way to block this stock from being used until the production order is fully completed and closed?

Looking forward to your suggestions.

entry.title: FMS query for Line total
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

May I know if there is a way to query sum of Linetotal of sales order details in FMS, If we have a way to manipulate the data.

 

 

TIA,
